_meta.note: Gated shell lane (TC49). Runs ONE shell line (pipelines/compounds/redirects) as [shell,"-lc",shell_line] through the same comb/bucket pipeline as command_start_combed. Policy: CommandShellStart, gated by the [policy.caps].allow_shell capability and evaluated as AllowWithAudit on an exec-capable profile; developer_local grants allow_shell by default, while profiles without the cap still return PolicyDenied. The MCP/IPC surface carries shell_line ONLY -- never a capability flag; caps are TOML/profile policy only. Output is combed signals + a bounded receipt; raw stdout/stderr are never returned here (observe them through bucket/event tools). The argv lane (command_start_combed) keeps SHELL_INTERPRETERS_DENY a hard deny and is unaffected.

output: combed signals + bounded receipt; never raw stdout
invariants: shell_line is required; shell/cwd/env/rules/tag/wait_ms are optional
available by default on developer_local: allow_shell is granted out of the box for one-shot shell_exec; profiles without allow_shell still return PolicyDenied

policy gate is CommandShellStart -> AllowWithAudit on an exec-capable profile with allow_shell; otherwise PolicyDenied, never ShellInterpreterDenied (the shell lane skips the argv shell-interpreter guard)
capability is config/TOML only; the MCP/IPC surface carries shell_line and never a capability flag
success payload contains job_id, bucket_id, probe_id, and cursor only
output is combed signals plus a bounded receipt; raw stdout/stderr are never returned here, only through bucket/event tools
env is an ARRAY of {key,value} objects, not a map; empty/omitted inherits the daemon environment, a non-empty list is OVERLAID onto (merged with) the inherited environment
the argv lane (command_start_combed) keeps shell interpreters hard-denied and is unchanged by this lane
